STAKING INCOME

ONLINE CASINO MARKET

Revenue in the Online Gambling market is projected to reach US$279.3bn in 2023.

Revenue is expected to show an annual growth rate (CAGR 2023-2027) of 9.02%, resulting in a projected market volume of US$400bn by 2027.

In the Online Gambling market, the number of users is expected to amount to 233.7m users by 2027.

User penetration will be 2.3% in 2023 and is expected to hit 2.9% by 2027.

THE RISE OF CRYPTO CASINOS

The crypto gambling market size is $250 million – A growing share of the $93 billion iGaming industry!

Over the years, 4% of all gambling has been with crypto but that percentage is fast increasing.

Since 2014, players have wagered more than $4.5 billion in Bitcoin.

Crypto gamblers place 337 bets every single second.

About 60% of all Bitcoin transactions are related to gambling.

The most popular cryptocurrencies for gambling are Bitcoin and Ethereum.

Crypto gamblers bet $3 million worth of crypto daily.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

What is Bybet?

Bybet is the leading online gaming platform that enables players to use their cryptocurrencies for an unrivalled variety of NFT, casino games, slots, and sports betting.

What is Bybet Token ($BBC)?

Bybet is proud to present our unique governance token $BBC. A $BBC token is a digital asset purpose-built for our platform. $BBC tokens are a payment method, a means for investors to receive rewards from liquidity and affiliate programs, and a way to exercise voting rights.

How is the GGR Sharing mech...

The Gross Gaming Revenue (GGR) is calculated as the amount wagered minus the winning payouts. ByBet's casino will share 10% of its GGR with early presale staking participants.

Why is GGR Sharing necessary?

GGR Sharing ensures that users who participated in the presale and contributed to the platform's growth are rewarded with a portion of the casino's revenue. It provides them with a stake in the platform's success.

How can users claim their s...

Users can claim their share of the GGR sharing by clicking on the "Claim" button in the Staking section. The GGR sharing is directly credited to the user's wallet in USDT. The distribution is proportionate to the user's ownership in the staking pool.

Is my money safe with you?

At Bybet, all customer deposits are held in an insured escrow account, either in $BBC or other cryptocurrencies. Your deposit is fully secured and available for withdrawal on a daily basis, with prompt payouts within 24-48 hours. All online transactions are coded and encrypted for your protection.

What do we bet on?

We're a global, no-limit betting platform, that's why you can bet on many markets from sports, casino games, world events, and more.

Where do we bet?

You can click on the Dapp button above to participate in our casino & sports betting.

When is the launch?

We'll announce the specific date of our Launch as soon as possible.

Where can I find your docum...

This is our documentation (whitepaper)

How can I contact you?

This is our linktree where you can find all our social platforms: You can then join and ask for support, there'll always be staff available to help answer your questions.

Minimum Withdraw Amount

The minimum amount required for withdrawal varies with each cryptocurrency due to their differing values

Timeframe for Deposits and ...

Blockchain transactions need multiple cycles for confirmation of successful recording. On average, this process takes about 5-10 minutes per transaction.

Troubleshooting Deposits an...

For any issues during these processes, visit www.blockchain.com for transaction status or reach out to technical support.

Deposit Confirmations Befor...

Withdrawals require a minimum of 3 confirmations of your deposit, visible on the cashier page under the deposit section.

Source of Transaction Confi...

Confirmation data comes from the wallet provider, the blockchain, and miners.

Duration for Transaction Co...

The time varies based on the blockchain and the transfer fee, ranging from 10 minutes to several hours.

Fairness of the Gaming Plat...

Our platform operates on the Ethereum smart contract, ensuring transparency and immutability of data and logic on the blockchain. Fairness and integrity are upheld, with all transactions traceable on etherscan.

Handling Game Glitches or I...

In case of technical glitches while gaming, try refreshing the game. If problems continue, contact our support team.

GAME PROVIDERS
